This field is a key that links the plan sponsor's contract and plan identifiers. 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
5 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS files) 
VALUES: 
Five-digit alpha/numeric value 
COMMENT: 
All contract and plan ID that were active in 2024 appear in this data file. To determine whether 
the contract and plan IDs in the data file represent the same plan in the prior year, compare this
